title: GROUP_CREATE + add_group_member not atomic: orphan group on DB error
description: ws.rs GROUP_CREATE handler calls create_group() then add_group_member() in separate transactions. If add_group_member fails (e.g. FK violation after user prune or transient DB error), a group row exists with no members and no creator membership. The creator gets an error but the group row leaks. Subsequent GROUP_LIST won't show it (creator is not a member), but it occupies a UUID in the groups table and cannot be cleaned up without direct DB access. Fix: wrap both writes in a single SQL transaction, or delete the group on add_group_member failure.
